name: Baked Chicken with Yogurt Crust and Peaches
recipeIngredient: 2 whole skinless chicken breasts, each cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a food processor or blender, reduce the stuffing mix to coarse crumbs.
3. Pour the crumbs onto a sheet of wax paper.
4. Coat one piece of chicken breast with yogurt as thickly as possible (admittedly, this is a messy step).
5. Dip it into the crumbs to coat.
6. Lay the coated chicken in an oiled baking dish large enough to hold chicken and peaches in one layer.
7. Repeat with the remaining chicken.
8. Surround the chicken with peach halves, cut side down.
9. Sprinkle the peaches (not the chicken) with cinnamon sugar.
10. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the breasts are just cooked through but not dry.
